About Us

Sri Lanka's Trusted
Parts Specialist

Established in 2010, Ekanayaka Motor Industries has been supplying premium automotive spare parts to vehicle owners, garages and workshops across Sri Lanka and internationally for over 15 years.

We are both a manufacturer of select rubber automotive components (engine mounts, gearbox mounts, arm bushes, stabilizer links) and an authorized distributor of spare parts for Toyota, Nissan, Honda, Suzuki, Mitsubishi, Mazda, Isuzu and Daihatsu — offering competitive pricing and unmatched part availability across Sri Lanka.

🏭 Own Manufacturing

Selected rubber parts produced to OEM spec

🌐 Global Network

Supplier partnerships across Japan & Asia

✅ Quality Assured

Every part tested before dispatch

🚀 Fast Dispatch

Same-day for in-stock; 24hr for special orders

Special Orders
24-Hour Special Order

Part Not Listed?
We Can Still Get It

Through our extensive international dealer network, we source virtually any automotive spare part within 24 hours — engine mounts, shock absorbers, stabilizer links, gearbox mounts, arm bushes, rack ends, ball joints, brake parts and more. Whether a rare component or a bulk order, we deliver across Sri Lanka.

  • Parts not in our catalog? Still available to order
  • International supplier network across Japan & Asia
  • Bulk orders for garages and workshops welcome
  • Genuine OEM and high-quality aftermarket options
  • WhatsApp confirmation within 2 hours
  • Competitive pricing, fast worldwide shipping
